title: 'Main Street Pharmacy Access Act'
content: The House Ways and Means Committee voted on May 21, 2026, to advance the 'Main Street Pharmacy Access Act' (H.R. 3164). This bipartisan bill aims to allow Medicare coverage for pharmacist-provided testing and treatment for illnesses potentially increasing healthcare access for seniors.

title: Simple in Governance
content: We believe that everyone should have simple access to government data. lol Gov aims to bridge the gap between the complexity of navigating legislative data and public access.
